sglang.title: [4/N]DP refactor: support watching mode `get_load` and shortest queue strategy
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Watching mode communicator

Watching Mode: If there is already an in-flight request, use the in-flight request's output.
Queueing Mode: If there is an in-flight request, wait until the request has been finished, and then send the next request.

Why choose the watching mode?

The load's changing inte

vllm.title: [Multi Modal][Performance] Fused Q,K's apply_rope into one
vllm.author: wwl2755
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Reduce Q,K's apply_rope into one in Qwen2.5-VL -> reduce time cost from 731 µs to 378 µs, also reduce GPU time from 485 µs to 255 µs
Merge multiple rearrange together in the code path of flash_attn -> further reduce 12 µs when flash_attn is used

Overall ~11% improvement in TTFT. I will work on othe

vllm.title: [Perf] Fix DeepGEMM Contiguous Layout Issue, 5.5% Throughput Improvement
vllm.author: yewentao256
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
We call get_col_major_tma_aligned_tensor to get an aligned col-major tensor, but unexpectedly call contiguous() and convert it to row major, which causes a lot of perf overhead during runtime.
This PR fixes the issue
Test
Perf
VLLM_USE_DEEP_GEMM=1 vllm bench throughput --model Qwen/Qwen3-30B

vllm.title: Force use C++17 globally to avoid compilation error
vllm.author: chenfengjin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
vLLM use some c++14/c++ 17 features, which may result in compilation error.

std::decay_t  used in scaler_types.hpp ,required c++14 or above
std::optional in many files, which required c++ 17 or above

Force use 17 as default CXX version  may reduce many confusing errors when build from sour

vllm.title: [Hybrid Allocator] Support Pipeline Parallel
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Different PP stages have different layers, thus the ratio of full:sw is different. For example, #23883 has 10 full & 11 sw in stage 0, and 11 full & 10 sw in stage 1. This PR supports this case by generating the kv cache groups based on the full:sw ratio of the full model.
fix #23883
UPD 202

vllm.title: [kv cache] update num_free_blocks in the end
vllm.author: andyxning
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Update num_free_blocks fields only after the check is ok. This can ensure that queue should not be in a inconsistent state when the check is false. For now, the num_free_blocks is updated but the blocks is not updated if assert error.
